calendar.matters:
MOTION For Protective Order Of Confidential Information And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Oct-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Murat Bajrami; 415-967-8088; Petitioner, appearing in pro per.

Not contested. Petitioner stated that he did not see the court's tentative ruling, and therefore did not give notice to opposing counsel that they would be appearing in court to contest the court's tentative ruling. Petitioner was absent when the matter was called. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER is OFF CALENDAR. No valid proof of service for the Petition on file. Proof of Service filed on May 25, 2023 does not include a completed Notice and Acknowledgement of Receipt signed by the respondent. CCP 415.30.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION For Protective Order Of Confidential Information And Motion To Quash
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Continued To Oct-27-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Petitioner MURAT BAJRAMI's MOTION For Protective Order Of Confidential Information And Motion To Quash.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Transferred to be heard in department 501 on October 27, 2023, at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all cases arising from the acquisition of real property per SF Local Rule 8.10A1. Mr. Bajrami to comply with SFLR 2.7B and deliver courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of the motion to department 501 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department no later than October 17, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
